element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player begins with lone Commander as primary unit; powerful and irreplaceable with destructor weapon, cloaking, water traversal abilities
Streaming resources accumulated at constant rate; unlimited but requires management; depletion causes nanostalling and power failure
Construction governed by resource availability; units build at varying rates; Commander builds 3x faster than construction vehicles
Higher tech levels unlock more advanced units requiring greater resources and build time; progression unlocks tactical variety
Laser towers, radar towers, defensive perimeter construction; power-dependent requiring energy management
Basic combat units with varying speeds, damage output, size; learned through engagement and unit counter-dynamics
Expanded tactical dimension; requires new positioning strategies and air defense considerations
Powerful high-tech units with map-wide range; map-dependent advantage; extremely high resource cost and build time
Legendary unit; strongest units with longest build times and highest resource requirements; story-significant
Visibility obscured without radar or scout units; adds strategic reconnaissance layer to battlefield awareness
Destroyed units and terrain structures provide lump sum metal recovery; economic resource management mechanic

typical_relief_triggers: Tech level advancement unlocking new units
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy unit emergence from fog of war
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating tension curve with resource-driven economy creating continuous low-level pressure; periodic spikes from enemy advances and tech transitions; late-game dominated by high-stakes super-unit engagements

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction phase with Commander and basic resource management; player builds initial defensive structures and starter units; AI opposition minimal
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation through tech levels; more sophisticated unit composition and base expansion; fog of war and reconnaissance become critical; enemy resistance increases
difficulty_curve.late_game: Super-units dominate (nuclear weapons, Krogoth); map-wide strategic positioning; resource efficiency becomes critical due to build costs; economy management peaks in complexity
notable_spikes: First enemy unit engagement requiring defense response
Tech level transitions unlocking new unit types
Krogoth emergence in campaign or multiplayer

notable_level_patterns.description: Continuous resource flow creates timed pressure; nanostalling penalty for overspending forces production decisions; power management adds secondary resource constraint
Campaign missions structured around unlocking and mastering new tech levels; each tier expands tactical options and unit composition variety
Single irreplaceable Commander unit creates high-stakes objective; player must balance offensive positioning with survival; loss equals mission failure
Each unit has strengths and vulnerabilities; effective play requires knowledge of matchups; unit variety prevents domination by single unit type
